title: Director's Pick: Funded Trading Plus – 20% OFF Your Masterclass Journey
description: The curtain rises on an unprecedented opportunity! Funded Trading Plus unveils a spectacular 20% discount, inviting you to star in your own trading success story.
seo_content:
Funded Trading Plus 20% OFF Deal

Funded Trading Plus has launched one of their largest promotions to date — a full 20% discount on challenge accounts using code 20CHAL. This is double the savings offered by their standard launch codes, making it the best time for traders who have been on the fence to commit to the UK's leading static drawdown prop firm. Whether you are starting fresh or adding another evaluation to your portfolio, 20CHAL delivers significant upfront savings.

Funded Trading Plus is a UK-based proprietary trading firm renowned for introducing the static drawdown model to the prop industry. Unlike trailing drawdown systems that shrink your safety buffer as you profit, the static model keeps your maximum loss threshold fixed at the account's original balance. This means that as you grow your funded account, your risk limits remain anchored to a known, predictable number — a major psychological and operational advantage for experienced traders.

With code 20CHAL, you receive a 20% reduction on the challenge fee across Funded Trading Plus's program lineup. At 20% off, the cost difference versus competitors with similar account sizes becomes meaningfully favorable — particularly given the static drawdown advantage that reduces the effective difficulty of the evaluation. The DXTrade platform provides fast, reliable order execution throughout your challenge.

Funded Trading Plus's trading conditions are built for professional-level execution: defined profit targets, fixed drawdown limits, support for forex and major CFD instruments, and a payout structure that has been consistently delivered to funded traders. The firm's UK base and institutional backing provide operational security that newer, offshore-based firms typically cannot offer.

To claim this 20% discount, visit Funded Trading Plus through the affiliate link above, choose your preferred challenge program, and enter 20CHAL at checkout. The discount applies immediately. This promotion is valid through December 31, 2026 — take advantage of this rarely offered 20% rate while it remains active.
